entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 30
entries.excerpt: Leah bore Reuben, Simeon, Levi, and Judah, and ceased to bear; but Rachel remained barren. And since she had heard from Jacob that Abraham had prayed for the barren Sarah and was heard, and that Isaac too had prayed for Rebekah and was likewise heard, she thought that her closed womb was not opened because Jacob did not pray for her. And so with anger and tears she says to her husband: “Give me children, or else I die” (Gen 30:1). She was angry, and so said “Give me children,” and not “Pray that children be given me.…
